channel.title: Extraction on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Extraction on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: How to Dial In Espresso: The Complete Step-by-Step Walkthrough
item.description: How to dial in espresso — the 4 levers (grind, dose, yield, time), the 4-shot protocol, reading taste and the puck, and equipment-specific tips for Bambino, Gaggia, Niche, DF64, and La Marzocco.
